meta.title: EduPay — Modern school payments for Iraqi families and schools
meta.description: Pay tuition with Qi Card or ZainCash, split fees with Aqsati BNPL, manage student wallets, and run schools in Arabic, Kurdish, and English.

hero.badge: Built for Iraq · Powered by Qi Card & Aqsati
hero.subtitle: Pay tuition in seconds, split fees with zero-interest installments, top up student wallets, and run school operations — all in Arabic, Kurdish, and English.
hero.trust: Qi Card · Aqsati BNPL · ZainCash · IQD

showcase.title: Built for real classrooms, families, and back offices.

problem.title: Receipts in shoeboxes. Cash trips to school. No transparency.
problem.body: Iraqi families today juggle paper receipts, untracked cash, and visits to the school office. Schools chase overdue fees by hand. EduPay replaces all of that with a single, transparent ledger built on local rails.
pains: Lost paper receipts and missed deadlines
No installment options for big terms
Cash trips that risk fraud and time
outcomes: Real-time fee status on every parent’s phone
Up to 12-month installments with Aqsati BNPL
Pay with Qi Card, ZainCash, FIB, or in-person cash
School dashboards that close the books in minutes

features.title: Everything a school needs to get paid — and a parent needs to pay.
features.subtitle: Six pillars that cover the full school-payment lifecycle, from invoice to receipt to wallet.

items.title: Fee management & transparency
items.body: Tuition, transport, activities — every fee broken down by type with due dates, history, discounts, and waivers.

items.title: Flexible payments
items.body: Qi Card, ZainCash, FIB, plus Aqsati BNPL for up to 12-month zero-interest installments.

items.title: Student wallet & cafeteria
items.body: Parents top up. Students spend at the school POS. Schools track every transaction in real time.

items.title: School operations dashboard
items.body: Bulk-import students, manage grades and sections, age overdue accounts, export reports in one click.

items.title: Localised for Iraq
items.body: Full Arabic and Kurdish, RTL layout, IQD currency, Asia/Baghdad timezone — built for Iraqi schools.

items.title: Role-based access & multi-school
items.body: Five roles, granular permissions, multi-school parent accounts, and tenant-isolated school data.

how.title: Up and running in a single afternoon.

parents.title: Claim your child
parents.body: Sign up with your phone, enter the school invite, and link every child in seconds.

parents.title: Choose how to pay
parents.body: Pick Qi Card, ZainCash, FIB, or split with Aqsati BNPL — zero interest, up to 12 months.

parents.title: Track everything
parents.body: Real-time receipts, fee status, wallet balance, and a unified history per child.

schools.title: Onboard the school
schools.body: Import students from CSV, set grades and sections, configure tuition and term fees.

schools.title: Issue & track fees
schools.body: Auto-generate per-student fees, accept cash at the office, watch overdue ageing live.

schools.title: Close the books
schools.body: Export reports per grade, audit every transaction, reconcile in minutes — not nights.

audience.eyebrow: Built for everyone in the room
audience.title: One platform, five roles, zero compromises.

parents.title: For parents
parents.body: Pay fees, fund wallets, and track every child across every school — from one phone.
points: Aqsati BNPL with no interest, no surprises

schools.title: For school admins
schools.body: Run finance like a fintech: bulk imports, real-time dashboards, exports your accountant will love.
points: CSV import, grades, sections, term fees
Cash + digital reconciled in one ledger

platform.title: For platform admins
platform.body: Onboard schools, manage subscriptions, and watch the platform grow with full audit trails.

wallet.title: A safer way for kids to spend at school.
wallet.body: Parents top up the wallet. Students tap to pay at the cafeteria. Every transaction is logged, every balance is real-time, and every receipt is just a swipe away.
bullets: No cash on campus — fewer losses, less risk
Live balance and notifications for parents

pricing.title: Simple plans for every school size.
pricing.subtitle: Start free for pilot schools. Scale as you onboard more grades, students, and modules.

plans.name: Basic
plans.body: Get a single school up and running with core fee tracking and digital payments.

plans.name: Standard
plans.body: Everything in Basic, plus the modules a growing school depends on every day.

plans.name: Premium
plans.body: For school networks: SLAs, integrations, advanced analytics, and dedicated success.

roadmap.title: Where EduPay is heading.
roadmap.subtitle: Three phases over 12 months — pilot, scale, expand.

items.title: .NET 10 & Postgres
items.body: ACID-compliant transactions on a long-supported stack.

items.title: JWT + RBAC
items.body: Granular permissions across SuperAdmin, Admin, SchoolAdmin, Parent, Student.

items.title: Audit trail
items.body: Every fee status change tracked end-to-end for transparent finance.

items.title: Multi-tenant
items.body: School-scoped data isolation with per-tenant configuration.

items.q: Is EduPay safe for school payments?
items.a: Yes. EduPay runs on .NET 10 with PostgreSQL, JWT-based auth, BCrypt password hashing, RBAC, and a full audit trail on every fee status change. Payments route through licensed local providers (Qi Card, ZainCash, FIB).
Eligible families can split a tuition or term fee into up to 12 monthly installments at zero interest, subject to Aqsati approval. Schools still receive the full amount up front.
EduPay ships in Arabic, Kurdish, and English with full RTL on day one. Schools can default a language and parents can switch any time.

items.q: Can a parent manage multiple children at multiple schools?
items.a: Yes. One parent account links to as many children as you have, across as many schools as you have, with a unified payment history.

items.q: What if a parent prefers cash?
items.a: School admins can record cash payments at the office. Cash and digital payments live in the same ledger so reconciliation is automatic.

items.q: Do schools need to install anything?
items.a: No. EduPay is fully web-based for schools and a native mobile app for parents. There is no on-prem hardware requirement.

items.q: Can EduPay integrate with our school management system?
items.a: Premium plans include API access for student rosters, fee schedules, and reporting. We can quote integrations during onboarding.

items.q: How fast can we go live?
items.a: Pilot schools typically launch within 1–2 weeks of CSV import and configuration. Full rollouts complete within a single school term.

finalCta.title: See EduPay end-to-end in 5 minutes.
finalCta.body: Use a seeded account to explore each role. No installation needed.
